g.title: cond_3_2
g.text: meets_condition(Visitor,"Is the visitor carrying the rare Flamefruit?")

g.title: cond_4_2
g.text: meets_condition(Visitor,"Does the visitor claim to possess critical information for the City?")

g.title: cond_5_2
g.text: meets_condition(Visitor,"Does the visitor appear lost or confused about where they are?")

g.title: rule_suggestion_2_7
g.text: suggestion(Visitor,'Direct the visitor to the nearest map kiosk.')

g.title: cond_7_2
g.text: meets_condition(Visitor,"Based on the conversation so far, does the visitor seem lost or confused?")

g.title: rule_suggestion_2_8
g.text: suggestion(Visitor,'Request the three required artifacts for summoned visitors.')

g.title: rule_suggestion_2_9
g.text: suggestion(Visitor,'Verify that the visitor made no prior stops before delivering their urgent message.')

g.title: rule_suggestion_2_10
g.text: suggestion(Visitor,'Ask the visitor to perform a simple reliability task.')

g.title: rule_suggestion_2_11
g.text: suggestion(Visitor,'Advise the visitor to wait until dawn before entry.')
